verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You have been good to me You have been good to me You have been gracious You have been faithful Meeting my needs

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, it's so plain to see You have been good to me I have been given so much I can't even Begin to thank You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And still I believe there is more I believe there is more I believe So I open my hands to receive All that Your love has in store Lord, I believe

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everything I have done All that I've said and sung Lifting Your story, giving You glory That's just the beginning

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Father, I know there is more Power to heal and restore Miracles, wonders, blessings unnumbered Love never-ending

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Exceedingly, abundantly More than our minds can imagine Love overflowing You are bestowing Day after day after day

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Lord, I believe Lord, I believe Lord, I believe
